response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, mentoring capability, and diverse technical experience, they fall critically short on the minimum qualifications. The role requires 8 years of C++ programming, but the resume shows only ~1-2 years of professional C++ experience (National Instruments, thesis work). Additionally, large-scale cloud compute infrastructure specialization is limited; the candidate is a versatile full-stack generalist rather than a cloud platform infrastructure specialist.
strengths: Proven software craftsmanship with strong TDD and CI/CD practices across 13+ years
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through leadership roles, workshops, and open-source contributions
Some exposure to cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and distributed systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Critical gap: only 1-2 years of professional C++ experience against the 8-year minimum requirement
Specialization mismatch—candidate is a full-stack generalist across languages and platforms rather than a deep cloud compute infrastructure expert
Limited evidence of owning large, ambiguous infrastructure projects or establishing architectural patterns at scale for complex systems

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (1-2 years vs. 8 required)
